headline: Earnings Beat and Global Store Growth Could Be A Game Changer For AutoZone (AZO)
summary: In its recently reported second quarter, AutoZone posted earnings of US$27.63 per share with net sales up 8.2% year over year, while adding 64 new stores across the U.S., Mexico, and Brazil to reach 7,774 locations globally. Although operating profit slipped slightly and inventory grew due to inflation and expansion, the combination of an earnings beat and accelerated international footprint expansion highlights how AutoZone is leaning into growth even as cost pressures persist.
